arts.ttl: PSG striker Randal Kolo Muani dropped for Lyon clash
arts.sum: PSG striker and France international Randal Kolo Muani (26) has been dropped by Luis Enrique for Les Parisiens‘ Ligue 1 home clash against Lyon. Kolo Muani’s €90m transfer from Eintracht…

arts.ttl: Juventus prefer David Hancko over Milan Skriniar
arts.sum: Juventus are actively seeking defensive reinforcements for the January transfer window. Injuries to key players Bremer and Cabal have forced Cristiano Giuntoli to re-enter the market, aiming to provide coach Thiago Motta with at least one, if not two, new defenders.
